items.title: Heat Convert Jahmir Young To Standard NBA Contract
items.blurb: Heat Convert Jahmir Young To Standard NBA Contract — The Miami Heat are converting Jahmir Young's two-way contract to a two-year, standard NBA deal, sources told Shams Charania of ESPN. The Heat waived Terry Rozier earlier on Friday, creating the roster spot for Young. Young's salary for next season will be non-guaranteed. Young will now be eligible for the postseason.

items.title: Wizards clinch NBA’s worst record with loss to Heat
items.blurb: Wizards clinch NBA’s worst record with loss to Heat — The Washington Wizards clinched the worst record in the NBA on Friday night with a 140-117 loss to the Miami Heat.

items.title: NBA Highlights: Heat 140, Wizards 117
items.blurb: NBA Highlights: Heat 140, Wizards 117 — Bam Adebayo had a 20-point, 11-rebound double-double and Pelle Larsson added 24 points off the bench to help the Miami Heat beat the Washington Wizards 140-117.

items.title: Heat Waiving Terry Rozier
items.blurb: Heat Waiving Terry Rozier — The Miami Heat are waiving guard Terry Rozier on Friday. Rozier has been out all season while be investigated for his involvement in a gambling scandal. Rozier's contract is fully guaranteed for $26.6 million. That amount will go on Miami's books as dead money. After having his salary initially held in escrow, Rozier has been paid on his regular pay schedule by the Heat

Williamson (6-4, 205) has appeared in five games (one start) and has averaged 9.0 points, 3.8 rebounds and 2.4 assists in 28.2 minutes since signing his first 10-Day contract on March 31. items.title: Swarm Win G League Finals; Tosan Evbuomwan Named MVP
items.blurb: Swarm Win G League Finals; Tosan Evbuomwan Named MVP — The Greensboro Swarm won the G League title for the first time in franchise history. The Swarm defeated the Stockton Kings 2-0 in the best-of-three G League Finals. Forward Tosan Evbuomwan was named MVP after scoring 22 points in the clinching game. Evbuomwan is on a two-way contract with the Swam and the Charlotte Hornets.
